# React + TypeScript + Vite Project Setup

## Project Setup Complete ✓

Your React + TypeScript + Vite project has been successfully created!

### Available Scripts
- `npm run dev` - Start the development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build locally

### Project Structure
- `src/` - React component source files
- `public/` - Static assets
- `index.html` - HTML entry point
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js` - ESLint configuration

### Getting Started
1. Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
2. Open your browser to the local development URL
3. Begin editing files in the `src/` directory
4. Changes will hot reload automatically

### Dependencies
- React 19.2.0
- React DOM 19.2.0
- TypeScript 5.9.3
- Vite 7.3.1
- ESLint 9 with React plugins
